title: godkinggoogle.com — The Google Critique
notes: Surface-as-its-own-deposit anchor. Minted 2026-07-13 via direct-deposit path (mint_deposit.py, not the external issue-form route). Original Zenodo DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20309780 (2026-05-19) went only to Zenodo and was purged with the June 19 account termination. This surface is now independently addressable via AXN. The 11 markdown papers under papers/ are content that gets included in the canonical text of separate deposits, not reading surfaces themselves; they stay out of the MSP apply pass.
